    Constructors in org.springframework.ai.transformer with parameters of type ContentFormatter
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    ContentFormatTransformer(ContentFormatter contentFormatter)
    Creates a ContentFormatTransformer object with the given ContentFormatter.
     
    ContentFormatTransformer(ContentFormatter contentFormatter, boolean disableTemplateRewrite)
    The ContentFormatTransformer class is responsible for processing a list of documents by applying a content formatter to each document.
